title: Anthropic Hits $30 Billion Revenue Run Rate with 80x Growth
text: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei revealed 80x annualized growth in Q1 2026, pushing Claude maker to $30 billion revenue run rate. Extraordinary growth trajectory: $87M run rate January 2024, $1B December 2024, $9B end 2025, $14B February 2026, $19B March, $30B April. Forward forecast: $55B in 2027, up to $148B by 2029. Company expects cash-flow positive in 2028 (year later than planned) as costs climb. 2026 expects $12B training models, $7B running them. Caveat: annualized run rate not trailing twelve-month GAAP revenue. OpenAI argues Anthropic's figure overstated by $8B, questions whether AWS/Google Cloud revenues reported at gross or net.
